caption: A man with a stylized, tall, silver-grey wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders and a red bow tie. Behind him, the wall is decorated with various framed photographs and clothing items, including a garment with the text "LEE". A professional microphone is positioned in front of him. On-screen logos appear on the left and right sides of the frames; the left logo reads "PODCAST" below a stylized graphic, and the right logo reads "LOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing; he starts by looking slightly downward, then looks forward while lifting his left hand and pointing his finger to emphasize a point, and finally returns to a more neutral posture while continuing to speak.
